ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the customer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first made a purchase */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., VIP, Regular) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales territory */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the territory belongs to */,
  "territory_target" TEXT /* Sales target for the territory */,
  "territory_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the territory against the target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the territory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the territory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "standard_cost" TEXT /* Standard cost of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Last date the product was restocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the region */,
  "region_target" TEXT /* Sales target for the region */,
  "region_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the region against the target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_months" (
  "region_month_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the region and month */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the sales data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "sales_target" TEXT /* Sales target for the region and month */,
  "actual_sales" TEXT /* Actual sales for the region and month */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_order_details" (
  "order_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order line item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount_pct" TEXT /* Discount percentage applied to the unit price */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the total price */,
  "extended_amount" TEXT /* Extended price (quantity * unit price) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product for the order line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
